source.section: 3 - Air-to-Air Weapons > 3.1 - M61A2 Gun > 3.1.2 - M61A2 Gun (Radar Tracking)

steps.voiced: Set Master Arm switch to ARM.

steps.action: Weapon Select Switch – A/A GUN (AFT), or « LSHIFT+X »
steps.voiced: Set Weapon Select Switch to A/A GUN.

steps.action: Master Mode switch will be automatically set to A/A
Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page and select Gun Rounds Options (MK-50 or PGU-28 rounds)
steps.voiced: On the SMS page, select your Gun Rounds option — MK-50 or PGU-28.

steps.action: Set Gun Firing Rate Option (HI = 6000 rounds per minute, LO = 4000 rounds per minute)
steps.voiced: Set Gun Firing Rate to HI for 6,000 rpm or LO for 4,000 rpm.

steps.action: When A/A GUN is selected and radar is operating, the radar automatically switches to the ACM (Air Combat Maneuvering) GACQ (Gun Auto Acquisition) mode Sensor Control Switch AFT/FWD/LEFT/RIGHT Gun rounds remaining GACQ Mode Scan Area ACM Mode Weapon Select Switch FWD: Select Sparrow AFT: Select Gun PRESS DOWN: Select Sidewinder RIGHT: Select Amraam LEFT: No Function
steps.voiced: Confirm radar auto-switches to ACM GACQ mode when A/A GUN and radar are active.

steps.action: Fly to place target in dashed circle on the HUD to lock it on radar when at 5 nm or closer. When target is flying through this scan zone, it is automatically locked on to in STT (Single Target Track) mode
steps.voiced: Fly target into the GACQ scan circle on the HUD — auto-locks in STT at 5 nm or closer.

steps.action: Fly to place the dot in the center of the gun reticle over the target and squeeze the gun trigger (« Spacebar ») when you see the SHOOT cue on the HUD.
steps.voiced: Center the gun reticle dot on target and squeeze the trigger when SHOOT cue appears.
